amendments.reason: Maintainer resolved OQ-2: persona name = Gilgamesh (external repo slug Rynaro/Gilgamesh, canonical casing). GO issued for rollout P1 (in-repo in_construction foothold) + P2 (cortex trim + token-budget CI, BLOCKING precondition). Change transitions deliberated -> in_progress; implementation maker = vivi (spec producer remains ramza; ESL checker remains kupo; maker != checker holds). OQ-1 (Arm-2 numeric non-inferiority margin) and OQ-3 (host-GP-slot approach) remain open and are pre-flip gates, not P1/P2 blockers. Frozen criteria untouched (SHA d088c0cc...); TBD_NAME placeholder resolution is implementation-side per AC-H02.

P3 executed. (1) Rynaro/Gilgamesh created + pushed (initial commit cfaff1a; EIIS conformance exit 0; GILGAMESH v0.1.0, cycle Gauge->Inventory->Lock->Grind->Attest); roster methodology placeholders replaced on the PR branch (989279a). (2) eidolons-ecl PR #16 opened (8 edge contracts + mission-contract.v1/handoff-request.v1 schemas; conformance CI green; release-stamped for v2.2.0). RESOLUTION RECORDED: the frozen edge_origin value 'emitted-request' (R-050/AC-F05) conflicted with ECL's closed edge_origin enum (roster|composition|implicit) — resolved by extending ECL's enum ADDITIVELY in the same v2.2.0 release (schema + spec 2.1 vocabulary + envelope v2/v2.1 + SDK Literal); backward compatible; ECL owns the field, so ECL accommodates rather than the nexus amending the frozen criteria. (3) Nexus composition.md regen + ECL_PINNED_TAG bump prepared as a patch, held until v2.2.0 exists (composition-drift pins a tag). BLOCKED ON HUMAN: merge eidolons-ecl#16 + create tag/release v2.2.0 (orchestrator was permission-denied from merging external PRs).

P4 margins frozen BEFORE any gate measurement exists (anti-p-hacking; user delegated OQ-1/OQ-3 via blanket GO-to-release). OQ-1: Arm-1 minimum cohort K=12 (actual N=15, stratified 5/5/5 easy/medium/hard); verified-completion floor X=80% per run, required on each of 3 independent runs (pass^3, Kupo precedent). Arm-2: hard MUST=0 over-capture on the strongly-matched (>=tau) subset (already frozen); near-threshold band [tau-0.15, tau) non-inferiority bound = capture of labeled-specialist-owned prompts <= 5% of the near-threshold denominator. OQ-3: host-GP-slot export is DOCUMENTATION-ONLY for v0.1 (GAP-002 — no host exposes an override mechanism; REVERSAL-4 consciously accepted: the member stands on S-internal + worker-archetype grounds). ALSO: pre-gate kernel gap found and fixed — AC-C01 requires the ROUTER to emit selected:[gilgamesh]; P1 had implemented the Step-2(a) branch only at the fixture/extractor layer, cli/src/run.sh had no fallthrough dispatch; wired in during P4 prep by the implementation maker.

P4 CONCLUDED — GATE FAIL, ATTESTED. Arm-2 PASS (0 gilgamesh fires / 76 prompts; MUST=0 met; near-threshold 0% <= 5%). Arm-1 FAIL: attempt 1 discarded (billing outage), attempt 2 (v0.1.0) 66.7/53.3/53.3 under grader v4, attempt 3 (v0.1.1 remediation) 53.3/60.0/53.3 — all vs the pre-frozen 80% pass^3 floor. Grader evolved v1->v4 (four never-stricter parser fixes, each documented in-file); independent gate checker (gate-checker-opus-fresh, maker!=checker roll-call clean) ACCEPTED all four fixes, re-derived both arms, and attested the FAIL (gate-attestation.md). Structural residuals for the human: (1) sandbox approval gate blocks `bash scripts/*.sh` — the frozen allowlist cannot execute verifier scripts several missions require (allowlist-vs-mission-scoping decision); (2) evidence-anchor fabrication under load persists through prompt remediation. AC-G06 ENFORCED: roster status stays in_construction; shipped flip and nexus release BLOCKED pending human decision. No further remediation cycles without human direction (anti-Goodhart stop rule).

v0.2.0 remediation LANDED + INSTALLED, but gate re-run BLOCKED on exhausted monthly spend limit (human action required). Forensic finding: the v0.1.1 remediation had reached only member-repo skill files the headless harness never loads (local .claude/agents/gilgamesh.md mtime 07:46 predated the 13:50 remediation commit) — so attempts 2 AND 3 both measured the unremediated P1 agent stub. v0.2.0 (member commit 1e75254) concentrates the mission-report protocol (REQUIRED-LABELS enumeration, verbatim-label rule, quoted-anchor rule, sandbox verify-routing ladder) into the HOST-LOADED surfaces: install.sh's generated .claude/agents/<name>.md + agent.md. Member tagged v0.1.0/v0.1.1/v0.2.0, roster pinned 0.2.0 + release_integrity metadata added, installed via `eidolons sync` (member now at ./.eidolons/gilgamesh/). A single manual probe run confirmed the v0.2.0 agent emits a clean, gradeable, PASSING report with a real quoted anchor. Attempt 4 (the first genuine v0.2.0 measurement) hit the account monthly spend limit after 1 cell — 44/45 provider-error stubs — DISCARDED like attempt 1 (see arm1-runs-attempt4-billing-outage/DISCARD-NOTE.md); the 1 real cell PASSED. NEXT: human raises spend limit (claude.ai/settings/usage) or waits for reset, then re-run `bash .spectra/research/gilgamesh-gate/evals/arm1-runner.sh` (already --model claude-sonnet-5 pinned) → grader v4 → gate-checker re-attest → P5 only on pass. Gate status unchanged: FAIL-of-record stands until a valid passing measurement exists; AC-G06 holds (in_construction).
